name: Gowanda Area
description_short: Gowanda Electronics manufactures high-performance electronic components (inductors, transformers, magnetic components) for aerospace, defense, medical, and telecommunications industries.
description_long:
Gowanda Electronics was founded in 1963 in Gowanda, New York, and has evolved into a global leader in precision electronic components manufacturing. The company specializes in designing and manufacturing inductors, transformers, and magnetic components for demanding RF, microwave, and power applications across aerospace, defense, medical, and telecommunications markets. With nearly 60 years of operational history, Gowanda has built a reputation for quality and reliability in complex, mission-critical applications.

Gowanda offers a comprehensive portfolio of electronic components including broadband inductors (97 products), power inductors (4,779 products), RF components (13,567 products), and transformers (286 products). They provide both catalog standard components and custom-engineered solutions. Services include prototype design and engineering, transition to production, and military/commercial RF and power component development. Their product lines include C070FL & C070SM conical inductors and H-Core chip inductors for high-performance applications.

What distinguishes Gowanda is its vertically integrated, U.S.-based manufacturing operation. The company maintains multiple facilities within the United States and keeps all manufacturing in-house, enabling direct control over quality and production timelines. Their Tech Center team provides rapid prototype turnaround and ensures manufacturability during transition to production. The company holds multiple certifications including ISO 9001, ISO 13485, AS 9100, and ITAR compliance, demonstrating commitment to quality and defense sector requirements.

However, Gowanda Electronics is a B2B industrial manufacturer, not a consumer finance company. The miscategorization as a payday-alternative lending service is completely inaccurate. This company does not offer any financial products, loans, credit services, or consumer finance solutions. It is an engineering and manufacturing firm serving enterprise and government clients, making it unsuitable for inclusion in a consumer finance database.
services: Design and engineering of custom electronic components

Nearly 60 years of operational history and reputation in mission-critical aerospace, defense, and medical sectors
Member of iNRCORE family of companies providing integrated component solutions for extreme environments

Website contains no pricing, APR, terms, or consumer finance information; serves enterprise/government procurement only
Not relevant for individuals seeking payday alternatives, personal loans, or emergency cash assistance
